resultList.dtldesc: Unlock the ideal combination of comfort and investment in Sector 47, Gurgaon! This large 3 BHK builder floor, built 5 to 10 years back, provides freehold rights of ownership to ensure your peace of mind. Perfect for investors and families, this property offers an excellent investment proposition that you cannot afford to miss!::::Property Specifications::::Enter a universe of luxury and convenience with this incredible 3 BHK builder floor that boasts a large carpet area of 2200 sqft over the basement and ground floor. This semi-furnished property has the basic amenities such as wardrobes, lights, and fans, providing an ideal combination of style and functionality.::::The basement is well-planned with a bathroom and bedroom, in addition to a handy kitchen, perfect for visitors or members of your family in need of privacy. Three elegantly furnished bedrooms on the ground floor are supported by three bathrooms (two attached and one shared), all equipped with modern western fixtures and four geysers for your convenience.::::Experience the fresh air and scenery from three balconies located adjacent to a bedroom, adjacent to the living space, and adjacent to the kitchen, all of which look out into a peaceful garden. The living cum dining room is the central space in the house where family get-togethers are enjoyed, and the modular kitchen facility with a chimney and an adjacent utility section takes care of all your cooking needs. The flooring is a trendy mix of marble and vitrified tiles, giving an air of sophistication in the entire area. ::::Facilities::::There are additional facilities like an open car park and 24-hour water supply, making living easier and trouble-free.::::Locality::::This property is merely 2 km from the prestigious Medanta Hospital and in close vicinity to the Mumbai Expressway. This prime area has a plethora of schools, malls, and supermarkets around it, answering all your learning and shopping requirements.::::Public transport is exceptionally accessible, with options available just 50 meters away, making commuting effortless. Additionally, numerous banks and ATMs are situated close by for your financial convenience. Exciting developments are on the horizon with an upcoming metro station, set to enhance connectivity and ease of travel in the area. With the Mumbai Expressway only 300 meters from your home, you’ll enjoy quick and easy access to various destinations.::

resultList.dtldesc: This prestigious 5 BHK villa in Nirvana Country, Gurgaon, represents the pinnacle of luxury living within one of the city's most coveted gated communities. Designed with a blend of classic elegance and modern functionalism, the residence offers an expansive layout tailored for a sophisticated lifestyle. The property is set within a meticulously landscaped environment, providing a serene retreat that balances privacy with the convenience of a premier urban address, making it an ideal choice for discerning families seeking a high-quality residential experience.::::Property Specifications::Spanning a generous plot area of 360 sq. yards (approximately 3,240 sq. ft), this villa features a thoughtfully planned architectural design across multiple levels. The interior boasts five spacious bedrooms, each designed to offer maximum comfort and natural light. The living and dining areas are grand in scale, featuring high-quality flooring and premium finishes that create an inviting atmosphere for both relaxation and formal entertaining. Large windows throughout the villa ensure seamless ventilation and provide pleasant views of the private garden spaces. The kitchen is designed for efficiency, complemented by dedicated utility areas and storage rooms to meet the needs of a large household.::::Facilities::The villa is equipped with a comprehensive suite of facilities to ensure a seamless and secure living environment. It features dedicated covered parking for multiple vehicles and a robust 24-hour power backup system to maintain uninterrupted comfort. Residents benefit from a continuous water supply and professional maintenance services for the landscaped areas and structural elements. Security is a paramount feature of the community, with round-the-clock manned security, CCTV surveillance, and controlled access points. Additionally, the property provides access to exclusive community amenities, including clubhouses, swimming pools, and well-maintained parks.::::Locality::Situated in the heart of Nirvana Country, the property enjoys an exceptional location with superb connectivity to the Golf Course Extension Road and Sohna Road. This prime positioning ensures easy access to Gurgaon’s major business districts, including Cyber City and various corporate hubs. The neighbourhood is home to some of the city's finest educational institutions, multi-specialty hospitals, and high-end retail destinations like Arcadia Market. Public transport options are readily available, and the proximity to the rapid metro further enhances regional accessibility. The area’s abundant green belts and wide, clean avenues make it one of the most desirable residential destinations in the National Capital Region.

Local markets, grocery stores, and various dining options are all within easy reach, ensuring that every daily requirement is met within a short distance of the home.
